name: learning-with-ai
description: AI-powered learning and knowledge management plugins

plugins.name: notebooklm
plugins.description: Import NotebookLM notebooks into Obsidian vault as linked knowledge graphs with citation resolution, YouTube channel bulk-loading, and expert-informed interviews.

plugins.name: learn
plugins.description: Interactive learning companion using Bloom's and SOLO taxonomies. Topic learning, breadth-first overviews, codebase exploration, and active recall quizzes with multi-session progress tracking.

plugins.name: learn-source
plugins.description: Adaptive learning from a local file (PDF, markdown, or text). Ingests into NotebookLM and runs /learn with cited source-of-truth verification. Progress persists per source in your Obsidian vault. Composes the learn and notebooklm plugins.
